title: My family trees
subtitle: Create and manage your family lineages

empty.title: No tree yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first tree to get started

createDialog.title: New tree
createDialog.subtitle: Family lineage or company org chart
createDialog.typeOrganizationHint: Org chart, customizable levels and subordination

activatePlan.title: Activate your plan to create a tree
activatePlan.subtitle: Create a free account (20 people) or upgrade to Family / Heritage for export and more capacity.

trialExpired.title: Trial period ended
trialExpired.subtitle: Your 30-day trial has expired. View your trees in read-only mode or upgrade to keep editing.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information
profile.name: Name
profile.emailHint: Required for online payments and receiving OTP codes by email.
profile.comparePlans: Compare plans and switch from the public Pricing page.

deleteAccount.title: Delete my account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently deletes your account, your trees and their content (photos, documents, history). This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This action is permanent: your trees, records, photos and documents will be deleted. Enter your password to confirm.

welcome.emptySubtitle: Welcome to geneamap. Here's how to get started in a few minutes.
welcome.hasTreesSubtitle: Pick up where you left off, or create a new tree.

steps.share: Share with your family or team
